merged: the fortress of C̱hihríq (Jabal-i-S̱hadíd)
folds.reason: Jabal-i-S̱hadíd ('Grievous Mountain') is the Báb's epithet for C̱hihríq — same fortress. Seed keeper.

merged: Ardibíl
folds.reason: Same city, spelling-gloss variant. Seed keeper (renamed below to drop the gloss).

merged: Zarand (birthplace of Nabíl, Persia)
folds.reason: Same locality; second is the same Zarand with descriptive gloss. Higher-mention clean form kept.
